purpose: Machine-readable ForgeUI component semantics for forge-app-design generation. Cell primitives outrank raw composition for any table/list/queue row. Toolbar primitives outrank custom filter-strip shells.
compositionDoctrine: DataTable cells: always start from the Cell* primitive that matches the field shape. Only fall back to Avatar + custom composition when no Cell* primitive can express the field, and the gap MUST be logged in FORGEUI-GAPS.md.

Toolbars / filter strips: always start from Toolbar + ToolbarSearchInput + ToolbarSelectDropdown + ToolbarDatepicker + ToolbarPillTabs + ToolbarShowSelect. Do not build a rounded white shell around bare <input> / <select>.
AppLayout owns sidebar / topbar / breadcrumbs / primaryAction. Page bodies never re-implement that shell.

components.name: AppLayout
components.purpose: Admin application shell with sidebar, topbar, team switcher, notifications, and profile.
requiredUsage: Use profilePosition="topbar" for Protask-style admin apps.
Use breadcrumbs + primaryAction + secondaryAction for detail and action pages.
forbiddenUsage: Do not rebuild sidebar/topbar/profile in page.tsx.
Do not add extra max-w-* / p-6 / p-8 wrappers around the page root.
Do not put /new, /edit, [id], or audit routes in menuItems.

components.name: DataTable
components.purpose: Primary surface for business queues, entity lists, audit records, and priority work tables.

fieldRules._priority: ALWAYS pick the matching Forge cell primitive FIRST. Raw Avatar / div / p / span / Label composition inside a DataTable column render is a composition defect, not an acceptable fallback.
fieldRules.identityWithImage: CellImageText (NEVER Avatar + div + p + Label by hand)
fieldRules.mutedText: CellMuted (NEVER <Label color="gray"> as a whole-cell wrapper)
fieldRules.progress: CellProgressBar (NEVER call <ProgressBar/> directly inside a column render)
fieldRules.actions: CellActions or CellKebabMenu (NEVER two stacked text buttons)
fieldRules.linkAction: CellLink (NEVER StyledLink inside a column render)

forbiddenUsage: Do not pass data=; use rows=.
Do not use onRowClick; navigation belongs in CellLink, CellActions, or StyledLink cell.
Do not use [&_table]:table-fixed on rich operational queues.
Do not wrap in a second large titled SurfaceCard.

Do not write
{name}
as a column render; use CellImageText.
Do not use <Label color="gray"> as the entire cell for a date or numeric value; use CellMuted or CellNumber.
Do not place a raw <ProgressBar/>, <Avatar/>, <Button/>, or <Label/> as the entire column render when a Cell* primitive exists for that field shape.

components.name: FullWidthTable
components.purpose: Full-screen data management variant of DataTable with built-in show-N rows selector.

components.name: CellImageText
components.purpose: Identity cell with avatar/logo plus title and subtitle in the Forge h-10 row.
avoidWhen: identity without image, use CellTextSubtitle instead
requiredUsage: rounded="full" for people; rounded="lg" for org/product/file.
forbiddenUsage: Do not re-implement avatar + title + subtitle by hand inside a DataTable column.

components.name: CellTextSubtitle
components.purpose: Two-line text identity cell (title + subtitle) in the Forge h-10 row.

components.name: CellText
components.purpose: Single-line primary cell value with Forge typography and line-clamp-1.

components.name: CellMuted
components.purpose: Muted text cell for secondary, non-decision values.

components.name: CellNumber
components.purpose: Numeric cell with optional up/down trend arrow and ProgressBadge.

components.name: CellProgressValue
components.purpose: Value plus small outlined ProgressBadge (green/red/grey) for delta indicators.

components.name: CellProgressBar
components.purpose: Compact progress bar cell with label and percentage; pinned to size=sm for row height.
forbiddenUsage: Do not call <ProgressBar/> directly inside a DataTable column; always wrap in CellProgressBar.

components.name: CellStatusDot
components.purpose: Status cell rendered as a colored dot ring plus emphasis-controlled label.
bestFor: status enums that should not feel like a saturated pill
avoidWhen: status that must read as a count badge

components.name: CellCode
components.purpose: Monospaced-shape semibold code/identifier cell.

components.name: CellRating
components.purpose: Star icon plus rating value.

components.name: CellFile
components.purpose: File identity cell with file-type icon, name, and optional size.

components.name: CellActions
components.purpose: Row action cluster (mail/phone/chat/eye/pen/trash) plus optional kebab.
forbiddenUsage: Do not stack two text buttons (Preview + Open) in every row; use one CellLink plus CellActions.

components.name: CellKebabMenu
components.purpose: Single kebab-menu action cell.
bestFor: row menus when no inline actions are needed

components.name: CellLink
components.purpose: Inline link-styled row action with arrow-up-right icon.

components.name: StatusBadge
components.purpose: Solid-color status pill for 1-of-N enums.

components.name: ProgressBadge
components.purpose: Outlined small pill (green/red/grey) for change/stage indicators.

components.name: Toolbar
components.purpose: Generic flex row for left/right toolbar slots above a DataTable.
forbiddenUsage: Do not wrap the toolbar in a second SurfaceCard. Filter controls own their own borders.

components.name: ToolbarSearchInput
components.purpose: Pill-shaped search input matching Forge filter strip.

components.name: ToolbarSelectDropdown
components.purpose: Pill-shaped select dropdown used in filter strips.

components.name: ToolbarDatepicker
components.purpose: Pill-shaped datepicker trigger for filter strips.

components.name: ToolbarPillTabs
components.purpose: Segmented pill tabs (max 5) for short filter dimensions.
forbiddenUsage: Do not cram more than 5 options; promote second high-cardinality dimension to ToolbarSelectDropdown.

components.name: ToolbarShowSelect
components.purpose: Show-N rows-per-page selector for full-screen data tables.

components.name: SurfaceCard
components.purpose: White outlined admin surface for grouped content, panels, rails, field groups, and compact summaries.
avoidWhen: wrapping a DataTable only to add another table title
components.defaultDensity: padding=sm or padding=md for operating pages; padding=lg only for major dashboard panels

components.name: ChartCard
components.purpose: White outlined chart surface for trends, status mix, and dashboard analysis panels.
requiredUsage: Default width fills the parent grid/flex column.
Use width="fixed" or size=4col/6col/8col only in component showcases, never generated app routes.
If width and size are both present, width is the authoritative layout mode; size is only a legacy fixed-width preset.
Let the parent grid define responsive column behavior with minmax(0,1fr), clamp rails, and gap-4/gap-5.

components.name: StatCard
components.purpose: KPI card with semantic theme and optional icon/action.
requiredUsage: Use non-white themes to encode semantics when multiple stat cards appear.
Default width fills the parent grid/flex column; use width="fixed" only in component showcases.
Use size=wide when the card needs the wide internal chart/icon layout.
Use trend / trendDirection / subtitle props instead of hand-rendered arrows.

components.name: HighlightCard
components.purpose: High-emphasis colored dashboard anchor.

components.name: ProjectCard
components.purpose: Identity-carrying project/work item card for dashboard rails and grids.
requiredUsage: Default width fills the parent grid/flex column; use width="fixed" only in component showcases.

components.name: TaskCard
components.purpose: Compact task identity card with status, priority, and owner.
requiredUsage: Default width fills the parent lane/rail column; use width="fixed" only in component showcases.

components.name: ProfileCard
components.purpose: Avatar + name + role identity surface for detail identity rails and team switchers.

components.name: HistoryItem
components.purpose: Timeline or activity stream item; variants: regular dot, badge icon, profile avatar.
forbiddenUsage: Do not render the activity feed as a <ul><li> or hand-rolled card list.

components.name: HistoryGrouped
components.purpose: Grouped HistoryItem stream with day/section separators.

components.name: ActivityCard
components.purpose: Compact activity card with title + datetime + body.

components.name: FileCard
components.purpose: Evidence, attachment, document, import, and export file representation.
avoidWhen: plain text links with no file context

components.name: ButtonGroup
components.purpose: Short segmented filter or mode switch.
avoidWhen: more than five options in one group
forbiddenUsage: Do not rely on flex-wrap to cram 6-8 options into one segmented control.

components.name: Label
components.purpose: Compact semantic badge for status, priority, counts, and readiness.
avoidWhen: entire date or numeric cell content

components.name: ProgressBar
components.purpose: Compact visual for risk, readiness, progress, SLA pressure, or completion.

components.name: Avatar
components.purpose: Identity anchor for people, organizations, queues, and records.
requiredUsage: When used in non-DataTable surfaces, pair with semantic Forge identity components (ProfileCard, HistoryItem variant=profile, ContactItem).

components.name: TextField
components.purpose: Single-line form input.
bestFor: search when ToolbarSearchInput cannot be controlled

components.name: TextArea
components.purpose: Long text input for notes, descriptions, resolution, and comments.

components.name: SelectOption
components.purpose: Select control for enum, owner, segment, scope, or configuration choices.
avoidWhen: two or three binary choices that fit radio/checkbox
status filters better served by ButtonGroup

components.name: Datepicker
components.purpose: Inline date/datetime picker for forms.

components.name: FileUpload
components.purpose: Inline file uploader for action pages.

components.name: CheckboxControl
components.purpose: Boolean or checklist input without nested label button semantics.
bestFor: single selection when paired with text
requiredUsage: Pair with a separate span/label text; do not use CheckboxWithLabel.

components.name: StyledLink
components.purpose: Low-noise navigation/action link.
avoidWhen: inside a DataTable column (use CellLink instead)
